open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtof (float32 string parsing)
[Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort buffer overflow for element sizes > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_strcmp for aligned inputs
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_strsep (BSD-style string separator)
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_memmove backward path + fix missing test_support.h

notes: No human-authored issues. Five open Repo Assist PRs: #85 strtof, #86 qsort fix, #87 strcmp perf, #88 strsep, and new (pending number) memmove perf + test_support.h fix. Windows CI has been failing since 0547cc9 refactor because tests/test_support.h was never committed — fixed in new PR. Pre-existing l_setenv failure on Linux (environment limitation). Next: buffered I/O helpers (l_fopen-style).
